english: I bow to the Lord of lords, embodiment of liberation, all-pervading, the essence of Brahman and the Vedas
roman: Namami Isham Ishana nirvanarupa vibhum vyapakam Brahma vedasvarupam

hindi: निजं निर्गुणं निर्विकल्पं निरीहं, चिदाकाशमाकाशवासं भजेऽहम्॥
english: I worship the self-luminous, attributeless, doubt-free, desireless Lord, the consciousness-sky dwelling in the sky
roman: Nijam nirgunam nirvikalpam nirihaam chidakasham akasha vasam bhajeham

english: The formless one, root of Om, the fourth state, beyond the speech and knowledge of mountains, Lord of mountains
roman: Niraakara monkaaramuulam tureeyam giraagyana goteetam Isham Girisham

hindi: करालं महाकाल कालं कृपालुं, गुणागार संसारपारं नतोऽस्मि॥
english: The fierce Mahakala, embodiment of time, compassionate, abode of virtues, beyond the world — I bow
roman: Kaalam mahaakaala kaalam kripaalam gunaagara samsaarapaaram natosmi

english: Fair as snow-clad mountains, deep and profound, his body radiates the glory of crores of love-gods
roman: Tusharaadri sankasha gauram gambhiram manobhuta koti prabhashri shariram

english: The beautiful Ganga flowing from his radiant crown, the crescent moon on his forehead, serpents at his throat
roman: Sphuranamoli kallolani charu Ganga lasad bhala balendu kanthe bhujanga

hindi: महेशं अजेशं परेशं गणेशं, महेन्द्रादिदेवार्चितं पादपद्मम्।
english: Maheshwara the unconquered supreme Lord of hosts, whose lotus feet are worshipped by Mahendra and all gods
roman: Mahesham ajessham paresham Ganesham mahendraadi devarchitam padapadmam

hindi: चिदानन्दरूपं शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहं, शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहं शिवोऽहम्॥
english: I am consciousness-bliss, I am Shiva, I am Shiva, I am Shiva, I am Shiva, I am Shiva, I am Shiva
roman: Chidananda rupam Shivoham Shivoham Shivoham Shivoham Shivoham Shivoham
